column1: # Service-image lookup table consumed by bin/detect-versions and bin/check-dependencies.
# Columns are tab-separated. Comment lines start with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# Policy: highest supported version wins for each row. Older runtimes within the
# supported range remain reachable via a manual compose.override.yaml.
# `version` is a boundary-aware prefix. A query matches a row when the query
# equals the prefix exactly OR continues with `.` or `-`. Examples:
# Rows are matched top-to-bottom; the first match wins. Keep more-specific
# prefixes ABOVE less-specific ones so a 2.4.9-p1 query hits the 2.4.9 row
# before falling through to anything more general.
#   - Mage-OS 1.x:    composer.json platform requirements of each release tag
#   - Cross-reference (Magento Open Source only, per-patch granularity):
